channel.title: Intelligence on Nils Myszkowski, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Intelligence on Nils Myszkowski, PhD

item.title: A Meta-Analysis of the Relationship Between Intelligence and Different Measures of Creative Potential
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we examine a meta-analysis of the relationship between intelligence and different measures of creative potential. Abstract This paper examines the focal construct and reports empirical and/or psychometric evidence relevant to its interpretation. The findings contribute to the literature by clarifying measurement, theoretical implications, and practical applications in context. How to access the paper You can access the full paper here.
